# Business Automation Mastermind — Workshop Site

> Live session guides, prep materials, recordings, and resources for a small cohort of business owners building real things with AI.
> Led by Joe Che. Published at workshop.mastermindshq.business.

## Sessions

- [Session 1: Setting the Mastermind Container](/session/1): Introductions, group agreements, and the mindset shift from employee to entrepreneur.
  - [Bonus](/session/1/bonus): Bonus resources from Session 1.

- [Session 2: Building Your First Web Page with AI](/session/2): Go from zero to a live personal brand website using Claude Code and Vercel. No coding experience needed.
  - [Session Guide](/session/2/guide): Step-by-step build guide.
  - [Prep](/session/2/prep): What to do before the session.

- [Session 3: Building Your First Lead Magnets](/session/3): Connect a custom domain, build a lead capture page, store subscribers in Supabase, and deliver resources automatically by email.
  - [Session Guide](/session/3/guide): Full technical walkthrough.
  - [Prep](/session/3/prep): Pre-session checklist.
  - [Bonus](/session/3/bonus): Bonus content and extensions.

- [Session 4: Mastermind Alignment](/session/4): Group alignment call to share wins, identify automation opportunities, and map each member's biggest needle-movers.
  - [Prep](/session/4/prep): Pre-session preparation.
  - [Wrap-Up](/session/4/wrapup): Recording, key takeaways, participant highlights, and suggested improvements.

- [Session 5: Give Claude Code Your Brain](/session/5): Export conversation history from ChatGPT and Claude, organize it into a Brain Dump folder, and wire it into Claude Code so it knows who you are automatically.
  - [Session Guide](/session/5/guide): Full walkthrough.
  - [Brain Dump Guide](/session/5/guide-brain): How to give Claude Code your brain, Part 1.

## Free Giveaways

- [Speak Human](/giveaways/speak-human): A free Claude Code skill that strips AI writing patterns and rewrites in your actual voice. Learns from your podcasts, books, and Instagram content. One command to install.
- [Ray Dalio Council](/giveaways/ray-dalio-council): A free Claude Code skill that runs a believability-weighted decision council. Five scouts argue your question. One synthesizer weighs them. Returns PROCEED, HOLD, or INVESTIGATE with a confidence score. One command to install.
- [Cross CLI Compatibility Routing](/giveaways/cross-cli-compatibility-routing): A public guide and universal migration prompt for keeping Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI aligned. Includes a direct PDF download at [/cross-cli-compatibility-routing-guide.pdf](/cross-cli-compatibility-routing-guide.pdf).
- [The Ultimate CLAUDE.md File](/giveaways/claude-md): A free CLAUDE.md template for Claude Code. Loads your rules, agent routing, iron laws, and project context automatically at the start of every session. Download and drop in your project root.
- [Web Design Arsenal](/giveaways/web-design-arsenal): A single prompt that installs 24 professional web design tools, animation libraries, and effects for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI. Build professional sites in an afternoon.
- [Anthropic Safety Checklist](/giveaways/anthropic-safety-checklist): Safety and review checklist for AI-assisted projects.
- [Lead Magnet](/giveaways/lead-magnet): Free resources for business owners learning to use AI.
- [Benchmark](/giveaways/benchmark): AI benchmarking resource.
- [Cross CLI Compatibility Routing](/giveaways/cross-cli-compatibility-routing): A lane-based routing architecture for recipes, skills, and workflows, with a universal migration prompt and direct-download PDF for restructuring large AI capability systems.
- [Ultimate CLAUDE.md](/lead-magnets/ultimate-claudemd): The definitive CLAUDE.md template for Claude Code projects.

## About

The Business Automation Mastermind is a small, focused cohort of business owners who meet weekly to build real things with AI. Capped at 15 participants. Led by Joe Che.

Homepage: https://www.mastermindshq.business
Workshop site: https://workshop.mastermindshq.business
Sitemap: https://workshop.mastermindshq.business/sitemap.xml
